name: codev-ai
description: CoDev — AI Coding Agent Hub. Install, configure, and manage AI coding agents (Claude Code, OpenCode, etc.) from a single CLI.

scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
scripts.prepack: mv README.md README.repo.md && mv README.npm.md README.md
scripts.postpack: mv README.md README.npm.md && mv README.repo.md README.md
